method: LIVE scanHtf (server/signals/strategies/htf.ts), lookbackDays=252, requireBreakout=true. NO LOOK-AHEAD: scanHtf run on bars [0..i] only; keep a hit whose breakoutDate==bars[i] (fresh same-bar fire). Forward +20/+60 trading-day close-to-close return; excess vs SPY over the identical window. De-dupe repeat fires per symbol within 10 trading days. IS/OOS = breakoutDate calendar 65/35 (split 2023-11-01). HAC/Newey-West t-stat (lag=horizon) on the excess series corrects for overlapping-window autocorrelation.
universe: HTF $5-75 / vol>=750k / cap>=200M; 969 names, sampled top 100 by volume desc
survivorshipCaveat: getHtfUniverse screens on CURRENT price/vol/cap, so the basket is biased toward names that survived into today's $5-75 band — it OVER-SELECTS the 2024 low-priced moonshots (QUBT/RGTI/RCAT) that drive the entire positive mean. Absolute returns are optimistic; the median + tail-robust diagnostics are the load-bearing evidence.

tailRobustnessOOS60.note: The positive OOS mean is a fat-right-tail artifact, NOT a typical-trade edge. Diagnostics on the OOS +60d excess distribution (n=817):

htf.deflatedSharpe: n/a — single pre-specified detector (the LIVE scanHtf), NOT best-of-N. No multiple-testing search over HTF variants was run here, so there is no inflated winner to deflate. The HAC t-stat already discounts overlapping-window autocorrelation; but note the HAC t-stat is NOT robust to the extreme right-skew here (the +60d max is +1226%), so it overstates significance — the median / trimmed-mean / win-rate are the trustworthy read.
htf.correlationCluster: price-momentum / breakout (pole = trailing momentum, breakout = trend continuation). Redundant with the AMC / BBTC / 1Y-return momentum vote — NOT an independent confluence confirmer.

bottomLine: HTF does NOT have a clean out-of-sample SPY edge on the $5-75 universe. Sample is well-powered (N=1953 fires; 877/817 OOS at 20d/60d), so this is not an underpowered result — it is a decisively negative one for the typical trade. The MEDIAN HTF breakout UNDERperforms SPY at both horizons (OOS median excess -1.30% @20d, -3.64% @60d) and only 44.8-46.8% of breakouts beat SPY (below a coin flip). The eye-catching POSITIVE mean (+7.1% @20d, +16.6% @60d, HAC t~2-3) is entirely a fat-right-tail artifact: the top 1% of trades supply 43% of the total excess and the top 5 supply 34% — they are the 2024 quantum/defense moonshots (QUBT +1226%/+1008%, RGTI +911%/+828%), exactly the survivorship-favored low-priced lottery tickets a CURRENT-$5-75 universe over-selects and that a ~$7-10K account cannot reliably capture or size for. Trim 10% of the tails and the mean edge collapses to +1.5% (pre-cost, still survivorship-inflated). HTF is also a momentum/breakout vote redundant with AMC/BBTC, so it cannot serve as an independent confluence confirmer. RECOMMENDATION: HTF stays owner-only — do NOT flip liveScan.ownerOnly OFF in shared/strategies/registry.ts. The current ownerOnly:true setting is correct.
